zh.lifeSummary: Lewsie aka Louise Cooke是Sir Anthony Cooke Knight的女兒，於1538年1月11日出生在英國英格蘭艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登。她於1558年4月9日與William Browne在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是15個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1613年6月5日在英國英格蘭艾可塔可泰德享年75歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cook  .

History: Francis Cooke (died 1663) and his eldest son John were passengers on the Mayflower in 1621; they were joined two years later by Francis's wife and other children. In the words of William Bradford, he lived long enough ‘to see his children's children have children’.

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: Lewsie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Lewis
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

nameMeanings.name: aka
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Louise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Louis , introduced to England in the 17th century. Like Louisa , it has remained perennially popular and is currently frequently used as a component of compound names such as Ella-Louise, Sophie-Louise, and Tia-Louise.

en.lifeSummary: Lewsie aka Louise Cooke was born on 11 January 1538, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir Anthony Cooke Knight. She married William Browne on 9 April 1558, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 15 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 5 June 1613, in Thaxted, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

Elle a épousé William Browne le 9 avril 1558, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 15 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 juin 1613, à Thaxted, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lewsie aka Louise Cookeは1538年1月11日にイギリスイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンでSir Anthony Cooke Knightの娘として生まれた。1558年4月9日にイギリスイギリスエセックスでWilliam Browneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも15人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1613年6月5日にイギリスイギリスエセックスサクステドで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lewsie aka Louise Cooke(은)는 1538년 1월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 사프런 월든에서 Sir Anthony Cooke Knight의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1558년 4월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 William Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1613년 6월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스액테드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Lewsie aka Louise Cooke родилась 11 января 1538 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Sir Anthony Cooke Knight. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Browne 9 апреля 1558 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 15 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 5 июня 1613 г. в местности такстед, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.
